name: @otfdashkit/ui-native-registry
description: Static-site wrapper for the @otfdashkit/ui-native CLI registry. Builds packages/ui-native/registry/ + a tiny index.html into dist/, deploys to Cloudflare Pages project otf-ui-native-registry → https://r.otf-kit.dev.

scripts.deploy: bash scripts/build.sh && npx wrangler@latest pages deploy dist --project-name otf-ui-native-registry --commit-dirty=true
